gui.comment_under_title:
Post the generated message from the "$LANG.gui.upload_all_comment$" button in $CONFIG.text.support_place$.
Additionally, provide some details about how the crash happened.
gui.comment_under_title_cant_resolve: If you can't resolve the problem by reading logs, join the $CONFIG.text.support_name$.
gui.comment_under_title_pls_report: If you want to report the problem or need help, join the $CONFIG.text.support_name$.
gui.comment_under_title_screenshot_notic: Please read the text above carefully. Screenshot of this GUI, tells us nothing!
gui.copy_split_log_dialog_text: The size of $FILE_NAME$ $LOG_TOO_BIG_REASON$ exceeds the limits of mclo.gs. To minimize the risk of losing important information due to the log being cut off at the end, we have split it into a head and tail of 25k lines or 10MB each. Link to which part of the log would you like to $ACTION$?
gui.upload_all_button: Upload all and copy message with links to all files and mod list diff
gui.upload_all_finished_button: Copy message with links to all files and mod list diff
gui.untrusted_domain_question: Do you want to open this link?
gui.intel_corrupted_msg:
Detected that your CPU is affected by a critical Intel chip bug.

If you are not familiar with this issue, it is highly recommended to read this FAQ. DO NOT report this crash until you have:
  • Updated your BIOS.
  • Made sure that the crash is not caused by this bug, as the issue won't be resolved even after a BIOS update if the CPU has already started dying. It is important to note that this update will not fix damaged hardware. If the PC has crashed or been unstable due to this issue, the CPU is damaged.
  • If the CPU is damaged, replace it under warranty. Intel has extended the warranty for affected processors by two years.
This warning doesn't indicate that this crash is 100% caused by this issue, but before reporting, you must check that a corrupted CPU is not the reason.
warnings.atio6axx: The atio6axx "Problematic frame" in a $LOG_FILENAME$ file, is part of the AMD driver for the GPU, there's a bad version of the AMD drivers that instantly crashes on an OpenGL task. Reinstall/Fresh install your drivers from https://www.amd.com/en/support IF you do not have an AMD GPU, then you need to set your system to be using that GPU instead of the AMD integrated GPU on the CPU, steps below. https://www.xda-developers.com/how-force-app-use-discrete-gpu-windows-11/
warnings.closed_by_windows: If this crash happened during game or level loading, it was likely caused by pressing keys or clicking the mouse. The error "The program javaw.exe version ... stopped interacting with Windows and was closed" in $LOG_FILENAME$ means the game froze, possibly due to these actions. To avoid this, let the game load fully—DO NOT CLICK ANYTHING, PRESS ANY KEY, or CLICK END PROCESS. If the crash occurred during mid-gameplay, just press OK and ignore this message.
